violations.text: Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. FMC must re-instate. PIC states class is scheduled. Two other individuals have active food safety certificate. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. State example provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Frozen spinach was observed thawing in prep sink basin temping at 59 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Food was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Proper thawing methods reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezers have an accumulation of ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
Handle on slicer was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

The condensate from the AC unit is draining into the second basin of the 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The coving under the 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) observed with food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

ROP tuna observed reduced oxygen environment in the sandwich station. ROP tuna observed at 37 degrees F. Label says, "Keep Frozen". Proper thawing of ROP fish reviewed. -Staff removed the ROP tuna from reduced oxygen packaging during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023
